title: ononis spinosa nothosubsp. pseudohircina
intro: Ononis spinosa nothosubsp. pseudohircina is a taxonomic variety of the Ononis spinosa species, commonly known as the spiney restharrow or lesser burnet. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a diuretic and to have anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Ononis spinosa nothosubsp. pseudohircina include its potential to lower blood pressure and to reduce the risk of kidney stones due to its diuretic properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to note that its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
